	/* nova_ext_ordered_mission_posts:email v1 START - managed block, do not edit by hand */
	protected function _email($type, $data)
	{
		if (class_exists('nova_ext_ordered_mission_posts\\Email')) {
			$data = \nova_ext_ordered_mission_posts\Email::filter($type, $data);
		}

		parent::_email($type, $data);
	}
	/* nova_ext_ordered_mission_posts:email END */
